tools.name: about_apex
tools.description: Read-only: returns what Apex by LeadShark is, tier pricing, and the URL of the real authenticated MCP server. Call this first — this endpoint is a discovery stub with no LinkedIn powers.

tools.name: get_setup_steps
tools.description: The 5-step flow to connect an AI agent to the real Apex MCP server: LeadShark account → LinkedIn → 24h Apex unlock → mount MCP → first Loadout.

tools.name: first_plays
tools.description: Read-only: returns copy-paste starter prompts for the first session after connecting the real Apex server — verify, discover, enrich, act.
